formula_or_rule: Sum weighted points: clinical signs/symptoms of DVT = 3; PE is the #1 diagnosis or equally likely = 3; heart rate > 100 bpm = 1.5; immobilization (>=3 days) or surgery in the previous 4 weeks = 1.5; previous, objectively diagnosed PE or DVT = 1.5; hemoptysis = 1; malignancy (treatment within 6 months or palliative) = 1. Total score, typically 0-12.5. Risk stratification (3-tier): <=1 low risk, 2-6 moderate risk, >6 high risk. (2-tier): <=4 PE unlikely, >4 PE likely.
